headline: Rome Court Ruling Tests Netflix Pricing Power And Investor Expectations
summary: A Rome court ruled that Netflix's subscription price increases in Italy between 2017 and 2024 were unlawful. The court ordered Netflix to roll back the pricing changes and provide refunds to affected customers. The decision raises questions for Netflix's pricing approach and regulatory exposure in European markets. The ruling comes at a time when Netflix, ticker NasdaqGS:NFLX, remains a key name in global streaming and continues to adjust its pricing and product tiers across markets. The...
